_comment: Tier-2 for fourc tsi#: TSI DYNAMIC/COUPALGO enum in 4C 2026.3 schema is exactly {tsi_oneway, tsi_sequstagg, tsi_iterstagg, tsi_iterstagg_aitken, tsi_iterstagg_aitkenirons, tsi_iterstagg_fixedrelax, tsi_monolithic} — 7 values. The earlier catalog had FOUR wrong names: 'tsi_iterstaggaitken' (missing underscore), 'tsi_iterstaggaitkenirons' (missing underscore), 'tsi_iterstaggfixedrel' (wrong stem — schema is 'fixedrelax'), and 'monolithic' (missing 'tsi_' prefix). Wrong values fail at YAML parse with input_spec_builders.cpp 'Could not match this input'. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
